data.title: Jasmine Hartin cleared of cocaine possession and assault charges in virtual hearing on Feb. 10, 2026 due to lack of evidence.
data.description: In Belize City on February 10, 2026, Jasmine Hartin was acquitted of cocaine possession and common assault charges during a virtual hearing overseen by Magistrate Perera. The ruling was made based on the absence of credible evidence supporting the accusations. This decision marks the end of legal proceedings against Hartin in this case.

data.title: Medtronic Q3 earnings expect $1.34/share, revenue $8.9B. Analyst sets price target $121. Investors eye $2.84 annual dividend.
data.description: Medtronic plc (NYSE: MDT) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, February 17. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.34 per share for this quarter, a decrease from $1.39 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for the company's quarterly revenue is $8.9 billion, up from $8.29 billion last year. Needham analyst Mike Matson upgraded Medtronic from Hold to Buy with a price target of $121. With an annual dividend yield of 2.82%, Medtronic pays out a quarterly dividend of 71 cents per share ($2.84 annually). Investors are considering leveraging the dividend yield to earn a consistent monthly income, aiming for $500 per month.

data.title: Alipay AI Pay hits 120 million transactions in a week, leading in AI agentic payments in China.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, Alipay revealed that its AI Pay, a payment method facilitating secure transactions via AI agents, recorded over 120 million transactions in the recent week. This marks a significant achievement for agentic commerce in China, positioning Alipay's AI Pay as the world's leading AI agentic payment service. Introduced in 2025, Alipay AI Pay has diversified its applications, incorporating AI agents in apps and mini programs for physical stores such as Luckin Coffee.
BoE's Pill: There is a need for caution on the last mile.

data.title: NUBURU activates Q1 2026 production ramp for 40 high-power blue laser systems under defense platform strategy.
data.description: In Denver, NUBURU, Inc. (NYSE American: BURU), a company specializing in non-kinetic effects and directed-energy technologies, has begun its Q1 2026 production ramp through subsidiary Lyocon S.r.l. This follows a contract worth around $850,000. The contract involves supplying 40 high-power 450nm blue laser systems for a Dutch agriculture project.

data.title: Quesma tests AI's security capabilities with BinaryAudit, finding only 49% success in detecting threats. Supply-chain attacks are on rise.
data.description: In Warsaw, Poland, Quesma, Inc. has introduced BinaryAudit, an autonomous assessment tool that evaluates AI's capability to identify concealed software threats prior to active harm. The outcomes reveal a mixed bag - showcasing potential strengths and notable constraints. Even with the top-tier model, Claude Opus 4.6, boasting a success rate of just 49%, the AI often misjudged harmless programs as hazardous. This is a critical finding as malicious supply-chain tactics are currently inflicting tangible harm. Significantly, state-backed entities executed a recent attack, seizing control over unspecified systems.

data.title: Bybit offers 14,000 USDT prize pool for Valentine's Day with unique rewards for users, aiming to spread love and celebrate.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on February 13, 2026, Bybit, ranked as the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally based on trading volume, is calling on its community to partake in Valentine's Day celebrations with exciting rewards. Under the theme of "A Better Way to Love," Bybit Fiat and Bybit Pay have collaborated to offer special promotions and activities for the occasion.

data.title: TC Energy files 2025 disclosure, (TSX, NYSE: TRP), in Alberta, Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on February 13, 2026, TC Energy Corporation (TRP on TSX and NYSE) submitted documents to Canadian securities regulators.

data.title: AGMH partners with MusicDog.ai to advance AI ecosystem, focusing on HPC and Web3+AI music, becoming full-stack AI provider.
data.description: AGMH has entered into a Letter of Intent (LOI) with MusicDog.ai to collaborate in the fields of High Performance Computing (HPC), audio Application-Specific Integrated Circuit (ASIC), and the Web3+AI music ecosystem. This partnership marks AGMH's transition into becoming a comprehensive AI computing provider, aiming to cover all aspects of the technology stack. This strategic move aligns with the company's goals for growth and innovation in the rapidly evolving tech industry.

data.title: 3E Network names Finland Mikkeli project as Nordic Compute Gateway for AI, focusing on low-carbon energy for TCO.
data.description: The Finland Mikkeli project by 3E Network has been labeled as the Nordic Compute Gateway, focusing on AI-native infrastructure. The project aims to utilize low-carbon energy sources to enhance Total Cost of Ownership (TCO).

data.title: 3 E Network secures $20M equity line agreement for share issuance, to be utilized for AI infrastructure & corporate needs.
data.description: MASK, known as 3 E Network, has recently obtained a US$20 million equity line. This funding will allow the company to issue shares as needed over the course of 24 months. The investment is intended to support the development of AI infrastructure and for general corporate purposes within the organization.

data.title: Arista beats Q4 earnings, raises 2026 sales forecast by 25%, stock rises.
data.description: Arista's stock surged following the release of their Q4 earnings, which exceeded expectations. The prominent cloud networking company also announced a revised sales forecast for 2026, anticipating a growth rate of 25%. This positive news was highlighted in a post titled "Arista Earnings Beat. Cloud Networking Leader Raises 2026 Outlook" on an investment platform.
